meta.title: Atishay Jain — Backend Developer & SDE at Flipkart
meta.description: Atishay Jain — Software Development Engineer at Flipkart, Bengaluru. Backend specialist in Java, Dropwizard, Kafka, and scalable microservices for FinTech & accounting systems.

profile.name: Atishay Jain
profile.title: Backend Developer
profile.lead: Software Development Engineer at Flipkart, building scalable microservices and high-performance accounting systems with Java & Dropwizard. I own features end-to-end — from design through deployment and monitoring.

about.heading: Backend engineer who ships reliable systems
paragraphs: I'm a Software Development Engineer at Flipkart, specializing in backend systems for complex accounting and financial workflows. My focus is building services that stay correct, observable, and scalable under real-world load.

I've owned the end-to-end backend to onboard a new Food Marketplace onto the core accounting stack, and delivered charters like Fee Adjustment and PayIn3 that directly impact financial and regulatory compliance.

My toolkit spans Java, Dropwizard, Kafka, Pulsar, and Kubernetes — and I care about the whole SDLC: rigorous testing, CI/CD, metrics, and alerting. Before backend, I built React front-ends at VMware, so I appreciate the full picture.

points: Owned end-to-end backend to onboard the new Food Marketplace onto the core accounting tech stack.
Developed core feature sets for key accounting charters including Fee Adjustment and PayIn3, improving financial & regulatory compliance.
Built and scaled reliable accounting web services using Java & Dropwizard for complex financial workflows.
Implemented asynchronous messaging pipelines across microservices using Kafka & Pulsar.
Maintained and optimized core accounting web services; resolved production bugs and managed deployments via Kubernetes.
Integrated JWT authentication across multiple microservices to strengthen system security.
Set up observability and automated alerting by integrating Dropwizard Metrics.
Improved code quality & coverage via SonarQube pipelines and comprehensive JUnit/Mockito tests.
Designed reusable React components and wrappers, improving code maintainability.
Used Redux for robust, centralized application state management.
Implemented secure authentication using JWT & SSO protocols.
Integrated Zoom & Microsoft APIs to embed key collaboration features.

contact.heading: Request my full resume
contact.intro: For privacy, my contact details and full resume aren't published here. Share a few details about the role and I'll send my resume directly to your inbox.

features.title: Verified requests only
features.sub: Please use a company email address

contact.successMessage: ✓ Thanks! Your request was sent. I'll reply within 24 hours.
